info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Debit Memo Request API
info.description:
Create, read, update, and delete debit memo requests in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_DEBIT_MEMO_REQUEST_SRV) supports the full lifecycle of debit memo requests used to charge customers for additional amounts such as undercharges, price adjustments, or penalty charges.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of debit memo requests

request.description: Returns a collection of debit memo request headers with support for OData query options.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic
Added as a part of security scheme: basic

item.name: Create a new debit memo request

request.description: Creates a new debit memo request with deep insert support for items, partners, and pricing elements.
